---
title: "Helena or Eleanor Dugay"
---

## Helena or Eleanor Dugay

**Dates:** (b. 1860)

### Description

dressmaker

### Biography

She was the daughter of Henry Dugay, carpenter, and was living with him in Stockbridge at the time of the 1871 census and in Southampton by 1881.

### Letters

- Letter from July 6th [1876?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
